text:
AoTs3-1000略 is the 5th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

"AoTs3" is an abbreviation of "Attack on Titan Season 3". In Japanese, "1000" is pronounced "sen", and 略 is pronounced "ryaku". "Senryaku" (written as "戦略") means "strategy".

All occurrences

Episode 40 - The Scouts are approached by Marlo and Hitch
Episode 42 - Erwin is sentenced to death
Episode 45 - The cavern collapses as Rod transforms into a Titan
Episode 46 - Opening recap
Episode 46 - Rod's Titan reaches the Wall
Episode 61 - The Warriors discuss the Tybur family
